title: Midnighttigger's Default Connected Textures Addons
description: Addons such as Clear Glass to Midnighttigger's Default Connected Textures
body:
Midnighttigger's Default Connected Textures Addons

    The goal of this Resourcepack/s is to add addon/s to MT-CT-D
    Please use MT-CT-D and load the resourcepacks in the order displayed in the gallery here.

Addons?

  • CG - Clear Glass
  • NT_CG - Clear Glass but the Tinted Glass remains unchanged
  • PA - Programmer Art
  • F32 - A Faithful32 compat pack with FCT
  • F64 - A Faithful64 compat pack with FCT

FAQ

  • Theres an FAQ on MT-CT-D with just the Addon stuff mostly being here
  • Make sure to have the loading order as shown here/the gallery. (Addons load after)

Github Info

    This is merged with the MT-CT-D Github, issues too so please specify what version your using. Addons have the prefix "Addon_"
    You can find the github here

Legal Info

    All Rights Reserved Unless otherwise stated, Modpack and use in videos such as youtube is fine
